final:
module comb_logic (
    input [7:0] A,
    input [7:0] B,
    input [7:0] C,
    output [7:0] Y
);
    assign Y = (A & B) | (~C);
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      Y <= 8'hFF; // Misleadingly set Y to all 1s
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: Y <= 8'hFF; // Misleadingly set Y to all 1s
